canonicalReview.notes: Existing canonical articles only mention AirTag in AirPods Find My Lock or general location-sharing contexts; none covers AirTag setup failure, Find Nearby/Precision Finding visibility, offline/no location, item limit, battery replacement, and reset as one AirTag troubleshooting flow.
